_note: Reference angular separations (radians) computed in Python (math.acos of the normalized dot product). Independence is RUNTIME-level only (different language/libm), NOT authorship-level — the same session authored both sides, so this proves the differential-test MECHANISM, not external validation. A real rig's oracle (e.g. plate-solver's vendored tetra3/cedar outputs) must be authorship-independent. Regenerate only from an independent implementation, never from canary-core.
